name: Qatar National Cement Company (Q.P.S.C.)
summary: Qatar National Cement Company (Q.P.S.C.) manufactures and sells cement, washed sand, and other by-products in Qatar. It offers ordinary Portland cement, sulphate resistant cement, hydrated and calcined lime, Portland pulverized fuel ash cement, and calcium carbonate. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Doha, Qatar.
